name: pmms
description: Preventive Maintenance & Breakdown Management System - Ways Automation

scripts.reset: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); try{fs.unlinkSync('pmms.db')}catch(e){}; require('./db').initAndSeed(true); console.log('DB reset and seeded.');"
scripts.build:exe: npm run prepare:exe && pkg . --targets node20-win-x64 --output dist/PMMS.exe --compress GZip
